Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[@Name = "BaseHare"]/tradeTags/li[text()="AnimalCommon" or text()="AnimalUncommon" or text()="AnimalExotic" or text()="AnimalFighter" or text()="AnimalInsect" or text()="AnimalPet" or text()="AnimalFarm"]

match.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[@Name = "BaseHare"]/tradeTags/li[text()="AnimalCommon" or text()="AnimalUncommon" or text()="AnimalExotic" or text()="AnimalFighter" or text()="AnimalInsect" or text()="AnimalPet" or text()="AnimalFarm"]
